turns.speaker: Employee
turns.text: I'm completely fried. I work seventy hours a week and I feel nothing but exhaustion and dread now.

turns.speaker: Coach
turns.text: That level of depletion is serious. How long has it been this way?

turns.speaker: Employee
turns.text: Months. I can't focus, I've stopped caring about work I used to love, and I'm running on fumes.
